title: UnleashedSMP
description: UnleashedSMP is a chaos and event plugin for Minecraft Paper servers, featuring 50+ admin-triggered events, random effects, and mutant mobs to create unpredictable, fun, and engaging SMP gameplay.
body:
UnleashedSMP – The Ultimate Chaos & Event Plugin for SMPs
UnleashedSMP is your go-to chaos and event plugin for Minecraft Paper servers — designed to transform ordinary survival multiplayer into a thrilling, unpredictable adventure. With 50+ admin-triggered events, random effects, mutant mobs, and an intuitive GUI system, your server will never feel stale again.

✨ Key Features
50+ Admin Events: Instantly launch wild, troll, or helpful events — from TNT rain and cat bombardments to cobweb traps, fake gift drops, player launches, and much more.

Simple Admin GUIs: Use /event to trigger chaos on a specific player or /eventall to hit everyone on the server — all through easy, interactive menus with player heads.

/lucky Command: Let players spin the wheel of fate with random effects — good or bad! A fun and unpredictable way to spice up gameplay.

Mutant Mobs: Some mobs have a rare chance to spawn with buffed stats and glowing visuals, turning every encounter into a potential mini-boss fight.

Modular & Extendable: Built to grow — add your own events or mini-games, and compatible with most other SMP and economy plugins.

Safe & Open Source: Optimized for performance and server stability, with clean, community-friendly code.
⚡ Perfect For:
YouTubers & Streamers: Create meme-worthy content and epic server moments with just one command.

‍‍ Community Servers: Surprise your players with random chaos, creative rewards, or server-wide games.

️ Server Admins: Easily run drop parties, troll events, or punishment systems without typing a single command.
How to Use
Drop the .jar file into your /plugins folder.

Restart your server.

Give your staff the permission unleashedsmp.admin.

Try /event, /eventall, and /lucky in-game.
Need Help?
Join our Discord for support, feature requests, or just to hang out:
https://discord.gg/xMg8YA8e3Q

Unleash the Chaos
Whether you're running a content creator SMP or a public server, UnleashedSMP gives you the power to surprise, entertain, and completely flip your world upside down — whenever you want.

Take control of your world. Unleash the ultimate SMP experience.
